channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Victims of the Washington paper mill disaster included husbands and grandfathers
item.description: Authorities have resumed the painstaking search for nine workers feared dead at a Washington state paper mill.

item.title: Hawaii police search for man wanted in connection with 3 killings in 2 days
The police chief’s sudden resignation puts Minneapolis back in tumult after years of crises
